eyebrow.es: Breakout de alfabetización en IA generativa · Grado 6
eyebrow.vi: Breakout hiểu biết AI tạo sinh · Lớp 6
eyebrow.ar: تحدّي الثقافة في الذكاء الاصطناعي التوليدي · الصف 6
eyebrow.ur: جنریٹِو اے آئی خواندگی بریک آؤٹ · جماعت 6
eyebrow.zh: 生成式 AI 素养破解 · 6 年级

chrome.sub: A photo and a quote are spreading fast online — and neither one is real. Generative AI made them. Crack four locks to learn how to tell.
chrome.briefP: Generative AI can produce images, text, and voices that look and sound real but were never photographed or recorded. Read the clues, then open all four locks. Each lock reveals the reasoning behind the answer.
chrome.footerText: Gen AI Literacy Breakouts · Runs entirely in your browser — no logins, no data collected.
chrome.winP: You learned that generative AI creates realistic media that isn't real, how to spot the tell-tale signs, that chatbots can hallucinate false facts and sources, and to verify before you share. Sharp investigating.

clues.title: Realistic isn't real
clues.body: Generative AI can create brand-new images, text, and voices from a prompt. None of it was photographed or recorded — the AI generated it. Looking realistic does not mean it is real.

clues.title: Small details go wrong
clues.body: AI images often get little things wrong: extra fingers, garbled text on a sign, mismatched earrings, or backgrounds that blur together. Odd or impossible details are a warning sign.

clues.title: Confident but false
clues.body: Asked for facts, a chatbot sometimes invents a quote or names a source that does not exist. Confident wording is not proof. When an AI states something false like this, it is called a hallucination.

clues.title: Find the origin
clues.body: Before believing or sharing, check it against a trusted source: a known news outlet, the original creator, or a reverse image search. No reliable source means more reason to doubt.

clues.title: Voices can be faked
clues.body: From a short clip, AI can copy a person's voice and make it 'say' things they never said. Hearing a familiar voice is no longer proof that the person really said it.

clues.title: School spirit
clues.body: The school team's colors are green and gold, and the mascot is a falcon named Swoop. Good school spirit — but it will not help you open any lock.

locks.title: What 'AI-Generated' Means
locks.q: What does it mean when an image is 'AI-generated'?
options: A camera photographed a real scene exactly as it happened
An AI created the image from a prompt — it can look real but was never photographed
It is always obvious and could never fool anyone
locks.reason: An AI-generated image is created from a prompt, not captured by a camera. It can look completely real, which is exactly why it can fool people.

locks.title: Signs of a Fake
locks.q: Check EVERY sign that a photo or claim MIGHT be AI-generated or fake.

items.t: Hands, teeth, or text in the image look garbled or wrong
There is no reliable source and no original creator
A quote or source can't be found anywhere else
A trusted news outlet also reports it with evidence
The original photographer is known and verifiable

locks.reason: Garbled details, no traceable source, and unfindable quotes all point to a possible fake. A verifiable creator or a trusted outlet's evidence points the other way.

locks.title: Name the Error
locks.q: When a chatbot states a false fact or invents a source but sounds sure, we say it produced a ______.
locks.reason: An AI can state false facts or invent sources with total confidence — that's called a hallucination, which is why you verify before trusting it.

locks.title: Check Before You Share
locks.q: A shocking image is going around online. Tap the steps to check it in the RIGHT order.
locks.reason: First INSPECT the image for AI errors. Then look for a trusted SOURCE that confirms it. Then DECIDE before you share. Inspect, Source, Decide.
